_comment: TFactory ESLint flat-config v9 — flake-risk rules for LLM-generated TypeScript tests.

no-restricted-syntax.message: tfactory/no-hardcoded-sleep: bare setTimeout() with a literal delay is flaky — use jest.useFakeTimers() or Playwright auto-wait assertions instead.
tfactory/no-math-random-no-seed: Math.random() without a deterministic seed is non-deterministic — mock it with jest.spyOn(Math, 'random').mockReturnValue(0.5) or a seedable RNG.
